description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named windows that runs on push to the master branch, on pull requests, and on a scheduled basis at 05:00 UTC on Mondays. Use a windows-latest job with a matrix strategy to test Reaktoro with Python 3.6 and 3.7. Checkout the repository with submodules, configure caching, set up Miniconda, create and activate a Conda environment, build and install Reaktoro, and run tests with pytest.
